old_value: {"id":"tns-csi-5c4","title":"Fix VolSync deadlock: DeleteDataset recursive=true destroys CSI snapshots","description":"DeleteDataset in client.go passes recursive=true,force=true to TrueNAS API, causing it to delete datasets AND all their snapshots atomically. This breaks VolSync restore flow which depends on the snapshot surviving after the temp PVC is deleted. Fix: (1) remove recursive=true from DeleteDataset, (2) modify deleteDatasetSnapshots to skip CSI-managed snapshots.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"fenio@debian.org","created_at":"2026-03-03T21:30:10Z","created_by":"Bartosz Fenski","updated_at":"2026-03-03T21:30:10Z"}
